name: Aquila Kill Team

datasheet.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.
datasheet.name: Death to the Alien

datasheet.text: Each time an attack targets this unit, if it contains models with different Toughness characteristics, until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, use the Toughness characteristic of the majority of the models in that unit when determining what roll is required for that attack to successfully wound. If two or more Toughness characteristics are tied for majority, use the highest value. For the purposes of determining which models in this unit can embark within a TRANSPORT , Gravis Veteran models take up the space of 2 models, but can otherwise embark within any TRANSPORT their unit can embark within, even though similar models in other units have the GRAVIS keyword.
datasheet.name: Kill Team

datasheet.text: While the abstractions in the above rule cause some models to behave differently to similar models in other units, they are designed to minimise complicated Transport rules .
datasheet.name: Designer’s Note

unit_composition.label: The Kill Team Sergeant is equipped with

unit_composition.text: infernus heavy bolter; bolt pistol; close combat weapon.
unit_composition.label: Each Gravis Veteran is equipped with

unit_composition.text: stalker bolt rifle; bolt pistol; close combat weapon.
unit_composition.label: For every 5 models in the unit, 1 Deathwatch Veteran is equipped with
For every 5 models in the unit, 1 Deathwatch Veteran is equipped with

unit_composition.text: Deathwatch marksman bolt carbine; special-issue bolt pistol; close combat weapon.
unit_composition.label: For every 5 models in the unit, 1 Deathwatch Veteran is equipped with
If the unit contains 10 models, 1 Deathwatch Veteran is equipped with

keywords: AQUILA KILL TEAM KILL TEAM SERGEANT AND DEATHWATCH VETERANS: TACTICUS GRAVIS VETERANS: GRAVIS

entries.label: For every 5 models in the unit, up to 1 model’s infernus heavy bolter can be replaced with one of the following:
items: 1 hellstorm bolt rifle and 1 Astartes grenade launcher.

entries.label: For every 5 models in the unit, up to 1 model’s heavy thunder hammer can be replaced with 1 power weapon and 1 Astartes shield.
For every 5 models in the unit, up to 1 model’s stalker bolt rifle can be replaced with 1 plasma incinerator.
For every 5 models in the unit, up to 1 model’s Deathwatch marksman bolt carbine can be replaced with 1 combat knife.

entries.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army can be attached to a DEATHWATCH KILL TEAM unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.
Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.
entries.name: Death to the Alien

entries.text: Each time an attack targets this unit, if it contains models with different Toughness characteristics, until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, use the Toughness characteristic of the majority of the models in that unit when determining what roll is required for that attack to successfully wound. If two or more Toughness characteristics are tied for majority, use the highest value. For the purposes of determining which models in this unit can embark within a TRANSPORT , Gravis Veteran models take up the space of 2 models, but can otherwise embark within any TRANSPORT their unit can embark within, even though similar models in other units have the GRAVIS keyword.
